top_signals.title: Stocks, Bonds Rise as Soft CPI Curbs Fed-Hike Bets: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A cooler-than-estimated inflation reading spurred gains in both stocks and bonds, easing concern about the potential for imminent Federal Reserve rate hikes amid a resurgence in oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: US Stock Futures Rise as Traders Parse CPI Data, Warsh Comments
top_signals.summary: US stock futures rose before the bell on Tuesday as investors parsed latest inflation data and Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh’s remarks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Frontier Airlines to debut in-flight Wi-Fi in 2027 with SpaceX's Starlink
top_signals.summary: Frontier is signing with Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi, with service debuting as early as next year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
